text: Natural language processing, or NLP, is a fascinating area of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand human language. Instead of just recognizing words, NLP enables machines to grasp meaning, context, and intent. This technology powers many everyday tools, from online translation services that convert text between languages to chatbots that can answer customer questions. Another common use is sentiment analysis, where computers determine if a piece of writing is positive, negative, or neutral. By combining text understanding with these capabilities, NLP continues to improve how we interact with technology, making communication more natural and efficient.
